summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Scroll Reveal Animations feature. All 11 test cases passed. Elements start hidden (opacity: 0), get 'revealed' class when scrolled into viewport, animations use correct types (fade-up, fade-left, fade-right), staggered delays work correctly on journey cards (0ms, 120ms, 240ms, 360ms), and animations don't re-trigger after scrolling past.

passed: TEST 1: Found exactly 10 scroll-reveal elements on homepage
TEST 2: Hero Carousel is NOT wrapped in scroll-reveal (always visible on load, opacity: 1)
TEST 3: All 10 scroll-reveal elements start hidden (opacity: 0) before scrolling into view
TEST 4: Journey section heading animates in with fade-up animation when scrolled to
TEST 5: 4 Journey cards have correct staggered delays (0ms, 120ms, 240ms, 360ms)
TEST 6: Prototypes section animates in when scrolled to
TEST 7: Map section animates in when scrolled to
TEST 8: Projects section - heading (fade-up), image (fade-right), details (fade-left) all animate correctly
TEST 9: All 10 scroll-reveal elements become revealed after full page scroll
TEST 10: Animations don't re-trigger - elements stay revealed after scrolling back (10 elements)
TEST 11: No blocking JS errors detected - page renders successfully

scroll_reveal_count.details: Exactly 10 scroll-reveal elements found on homepage

hero_not_wrapped.details: Hero Carousel is NOT wrapped in scroll-reveal, always visible on load with opacity: 1

initial_hidden_state.details: All 10 elements start with opacity: 0 and no 'revealed' class before scrolling

journey_heading_animation.details: Journey section heading uses fade-up animation, reveals when scrolled into view

prototypes_section.details: Prototypes section wrapped in ScrollReveal with fade-up animation

map_section.details: Map section wrapped in ScrollReveal with fade-up animation

projects_section.details: Projects section has 3 elements: heading (fade-up), image (fade-right), details (fade-left)

all_revealed_after_scroll.details: All 10 elements get 'revealed' class after full page scroll

no_re_trigger.details: Elements stay revealed after scrolling back - IntersectionObserver unobserves after reveal

no_js_errors.details: Page renders successfully with no blocking JS errors

test_credentials: No auth required for homepage scroll animation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scroll reveal animations fully tested and working. 10 total scroll-reveal elements on homepage. Animation types: 8 fade-up, 1 fade-right, 1 fade-left. Journey cards have staggered delays (0, 120, 240, 360ms). CSS transition is 0.8s with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1). Elements unobserve after reveal (one-time animation). Hero Carousel is NOT wrapped in scroll-reveal. Cookie banner may appear - dismiss with 'Accept All'.
